description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and Deploy that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has two jobs: build and deploy. The build job runs on ubuntu-24.04, skips commits with 'wip' in the message, and uses a matrix strategy to test with Python 3.9, 3.10, 3.11, and 3.12. It checks out the code, sets up Python, installs dependencies with poetry, runs flake8 and pytest tests, and uploads test results. The deploy job runs on ubuntu-24.04, depends on the build job, and only runs on push events to tags. It uses a matrix strategy with Python 3.10, checks out the code, sets up Python, installs dependencies, and publishes to PyPI using poetry.
